    Element
    Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.java.transformations.pipeline.JMLCommentTransformer
    de.uka.ilkd.key.scripts.AxiomCommand
    This command is deprecated and should not be used in new scripts. It is kept for compatibility reasons. Use the AssumeCommand "assume" instead.

    Interface
    Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.quantifierHeuristics.Constraint

    Class
    Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions.TacletOptionsAction
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.configuration.ViewSelector
    weigl, 2019-05-10: integrated into the StandardUISettings
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.MainWindowTabbedPane
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification.events.GeneralFailureEvent
    use IssueDialog
    de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.abstraction.DefaultConstructor
    is actually never used
    de.uka.ilkd.key.java.transformations.pipeline.JMLCommentTransformer
    de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.DefaultTermParser
    Use the facade new KeyIO(services).parseTerm directly
    de.uka.ilkd.key.scripts.AxiomCommand
    This command is deprecated and should not be used in new scripts. It is kept for compatibility reasons. Use the AssumeCommand "assume" instead.

    Field
    Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.KeYLexer.tokenNames
    Use KeYLexer.VOCABULARY instead.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.KeYParser.tokenNames
    Use KeYParser.VOCABULARY instead.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml.JmlLexer.tokenNames
    Use JmlLexer.VOCABULARY instead.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml.JmlParser.tokenNames
    Use JmlParser.VOCABULARY instead.

    Prefer patch_make(String text1, LinkedList diffs).

    de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.PositionInfo.getFileName()
    This method should no longer be used, as PositionInfo can now be used with resources other than files. Use PositionInfo.getURI() instead.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.PositionInfo.getParentClass()
    This method should no longer be used, as PositionInfo can now be used with resources other than files. Use PositionInfo.getParentClassURI() instead.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.ProgramMethod.getKJT()
    de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.KeYLexer.getTokenNames()
    de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.KeYParser.getTokenNames()
    de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.ParsingFacade.parseIdDeclaration(CharStream)
     
    de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.Location.fromFileName(String, Position)
    Use Location(URI, Position) instead.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.Location.getFileURI()
    de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt.ProofCorrectnessMgt.contractApplicableFor(KeYJavaType, IObserverFunction)
    de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.Proof.add(Goal)
    use Proof.reOpenGoal(Goal) when re-opening a goal
    de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.UnwindLoop.getInnerLabelSV()
    de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.UnwindLoop.getOuterLabelSV()
    de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.ProofSettings.getProperties()
    ProofSettings.getConfiguration()
    de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.ProofSettings.loadSettingsFromPropertyStream(Reader)
    in favour of ProofSettings.loadSettingsFromJSONStream(Reader)
    de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.Settings.readSettings(Properties)
    Deprecated in favour of Settings.readSettings(Configuration)
    de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.Settings.writeSettings(Properties)
    Deprecated in favour of Settings.writeSettings(Configuration)

    This class has been merged with StringUtil. Call StringUtil.containsWholeWord(String, String)

    This class has been merged with StringUtil. Call StringUtil.isJMLComment(String)
